title: Peripheral Blood Mononuclear Cells Preparation
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"ffgt6","text":"15mls whole blood (fresh)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cqima","text":"1% FCS= Foetal Calf Serum (Phosphate buffered saline with 1% foetal calf serum)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2sg71","text":"RPMI = RPMI 1640 containing GlutaMAX, 10% HyClone FBS, 50 mg/mL streptomycin, 50 U/mL penicillin, 2.5 μg/ml amphotericin B - fungizone, and 25 mM HEPES","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3b0d8","text":"LymphoprepTM (Axis-Shield, Dundee, UK)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":10,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"e65pm","text":"ethidium bromide/acridine orange.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Dilute whole blood 1:1 with 1% FCS HBSS Medium
Layer this diluted blood onto 10mls Lymphoprep TM
Centrifuge for 25 minutes at 400G with acceleration and brake off
Discard the plasma and obtain the buffy coat
Top up buffy coat with 1% FCS, vortex and Centrifuge for 8 minutes at 1500RPM with brake on. Discard supernatant
Top up with 1% FCS, vortex and centrifuge for 8 minutes at 1500RPM with brake on. Discard supernatant.
Resuspend in 4-5mls of RPMI, and vortex.
Count live cells with haemocytometer slide after staining with ethidium bromide and acridine orange solution to detect dead and live cells, respectively
creator: John Davis Coakley
